response:
I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription, specializing in all medical specialties. I possess strong knowledge of medical terminology and have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I have excellent interpersonal skills, a keen willingness to learn, and a strong track record of productivity and quality. I am a multi-tasker who excels in supervising, transcription, and customer relationship management, consistently exceeding expectations to contribute to organizational success.  

I am seeking a medical scribe or transcription position with experience in platforms such as eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office. I have a strong background in quality assurance, editing, and customer service, with a focus on accuracy, speed, and TAT. I am adaptable, reliable, and a team leader with a positive attitude and strong leadership skills. I am proficient in Word, Excel, Outlook, and electronic health records, with a typing speed of 70-80 words per minute.  

I am an enthusiastic and passionate professional with a background in mechanical engineering and a commitment to excellence in medical transcription. I am eager to contribute my skills and experience to a dynamic and successful organization.
